title: Velvety Umami Dark Soft Brown Sugar Stir-fry
description: This one-pot German dish features velvety flavors of dark soft brown sugar and umami-rich elements in a quick-cooking, flavorful meal perfect for lunch or dinner.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet or saucepan over medium heat.
Add sliced chicken to the pan, sprinkle with salt and pepper, and cook until golden brown on both sides. Remove from heat.
In the same pan, add minced garlic and finely chopped onion, sauté for about 2 minutes.
Stir in carrots and celery, cooking for an additional 5-7 minutes until vegetables are tender.
Pour in dark soft brown sugar and a splash of water or chicken broth. Stir well to combine.
Return cooked chicken pieces back into the pan along with any accumulated juices, ensuring everything is evenly coated by the dark brown sugar mixture.
Simmer for about 5-7 minutes until thickened slightly, stirring occasionally.
Serve hot as a main course or side dish.
